description: Style NoteThese El Rey Slipon from puma are both feminine and versatile. They feature synthetic upper with stripes and a cushioned foot-bed. The rubber outsole adds extra grip making these shoes perfect for urban living. Product DetailsBlack and grey striped slip-on with synthetic upper, a rubber strap on the midfoot with branding and a haul loop at the heel counterCushioned footbed for all day comfortThick rubber outsoleTPU outsole with herringbone grooves Material and CareSyntheticRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
